case_title: CAMELIA HERRERA VS. GRACIELA SALGADO RIOS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERRERA, CAMELIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIOS, GRACIELA SALGADO MAZARIEGOS, CARMELINO BATEN $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $550.00, BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DEFENDANTS, NOTIFYING COURT OF NEW MAILING ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT RIOS, GRACIELA SALGADO MAZARIEGOS, CARMELINO BATEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---NATALIE GALDAMEZ. BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2015 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RIOS, GRACIELA SALGADO MAZARIEGOS, CARMELINO BATEN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY HERRERA, CAMELIA AS TO DEFENDANT RIOS, GRACIELA SALGADO MAZARIEGOS, CARMELINO BATEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
